purpose: Access USGS National Hydrography Dataset (NHD) and NLDI services

NLDI.get_basins.note: Pass gauge ID as string, not integer. Returns GeoDataFrame with basin polygon.

WaterData.get_byid.note: comid in NLDI is nhdplusid in NHDPlus HR. Do not mix them.

gotchas: NLDI uses 8-digit gauge IDs prefixed with 'USGS-' internally. NLDI().get_basins() accepts bare 8-digit IDs.
get_basins() returns a single-row GeoDataFrame. Access geometry via gdf.geometry.iloc[0].
CRS is always EPSG:4326 from NLDI. Re-project before area calculations: gdf.to_crs('EPSG:5070').area / 1e6 for km².
WaterData().get_bybox() bbox order is (west, south, east, north) — NOT (min_lon, min_lat, max_lon, max_lat) despite looking the same.
Timeout errors are common on slow NLDI endpoints. Retry once before failing.
PyGeoAPI class names changed in 0.15 → use pynhd.NLDI, pynhd.WaterData, pynhd.NHDPlusHR.

common_patterns.get_watershed_polygon:
from pynhd import NLDI
nldi = NLDI()
basin_gdf = nldi.get_basins('01031500')
geom = basin_gdf.geometry.iloc[0]
common_patterns.get_gauge_metadata:
from pynhd import NLDI
info = NLDI().get_info({'featureSource': 'nwissite', 'featureID': 'USGS-01031500'})
print(info['name'], info['comid'])
